topRepos.description: Klavis AI:  MCP integration platforms that let AI agents use tools reliably at any scale

Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

OneFlow is a deep learning framework designed to be user-friendly, scalable and efficient.
Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents.
UFO³: Weaving the Digital Agent Galaxy

BISHENG is an open LLM devops platform for next generation Enterprise AI applications. Powerful and comprehensive features include: GenAI workflow, RAG, Agent, Unified model management, Evaluation, SFT, Dataset Management, Enterprise-level System Management, Observability and more.

数字底座是一款面向大型政府、企业数字化转型，基于身份认证、组织架构、岗位职务、应用系统、资源角色、数据目录、安全控制等功能构建的统一且安全的管理支撑平台。数字底座基于三员管理模式，具备微服务、多租户、容器化和国产化，支持用户利用代码生成器快速构建自己的业务应用，同时可关联诸多成熟且好用的内部生态应用。
Orillusion is a pure Web3D rendering engine which is fully developed based on the WebGPU standard.
MemoryBear Equip AI with human-like memory capability
A Doctor for your data

Open source platform for iot , 6 min Quick Deployment,10M devices connection,Carrier level Stability;物联网开源平台,6分钟快速部署,千万级承载,电信级稳定性. Low code for Object model-Rule Engine-Data Channel-Configuration Page; Fully open source, Multi industrial protocols are compatible.物模型-规则引擎-数据通道-组态页面全流程零代码开发、全业务全链路模拟压测、前后端完全开源、多行业工业协议兼容。QQ群:346566935
Run AI models end-to-end encrypted.
GigaBrain-0: A World Model-Powered Vision-Language-Action Model

LakeSoul is an end-to-end, realtime cloud-native Lakehouse framework for fast data ingestion, concurrent updates, incremental analytics, multimodal data processing and vector search — powering next-generation BI and AI workloads.
Skywork-R1V is an advanced multimodal AI model series developed by Skywork AI, specializing in vision-language reasoning.
SDG is a specialized framework designed to generate high-quality structured tabular data.
HunyuanVideo-1.5: A leading lightweight video generation model
FIT: 企业级AI开发框架，提供多语言函数引擎（FIT）、流式编排引擎（WaterFlow）及Java生态的LangChain替代方案（FEL）。原生/Spring双模运行，支持插件热插拔与智能聚散部署，无缝统一大模型与业务系统。

CSGHub is a brand-new open-source platform for managing LLMs, developed by the OpenCSG team. It offers both open-source and on-premise/SaaS solutions, with features comparable to Hugging Face. Gain full control over the lifecycle of LLMs, datasets, and agents, with Python SDK compatibility with Hugging Face. Join us! ⭐️
Easiest and laziest way for  building multi-agent LLMs applications.
[ICLR 2025] Hallo2: Long-Duration and High-Resolution Audio-driven Portrait Image Animation
System Level Intelligent Router for Mixture-of-Models at Cloud, Data Center and Edge
Fulling is an AI-powered Full-stack Engineer Agent. Built with Next.js, Claude, shadcn/ui, and PostgreSQL. Use kubernetes as infra.

DeepBot is a system-level AI assistant built for both personal productivity and enterprise workflows — one-click setup, seamless experience, and native Feishu integration.
Costrict - strict AI coder for enterprises, quality first, including AI Agent, AI CodeReview, AI Completion.
Res-SAM Framework for GPR Underground Hazard Detection
A lightweight LMM-based Document Parsing Model
DAMO-YOLO: a fast and accurate object detection method with some new techs, including NAS backbones, efficient RepGFPN, ZeroHead, AlignedOTA, and distillation enhancement.
Bitalostored is a high-performance distributed storage system, core engine based on bitalosdb(self-developed), compatible with Redis protocol.
Synthetic Data Generation Platform By DataArcTech

[NeurIPS 2024 Best Paper Award][GPT beats diffusion🔥] [scaling laws in visual generation📈] Official impl. of "Visual Autoregressive Modeling: Scalable Image Generation via Next-Scale Prediction". An *ultra-simple, user-friendly yet state-of-the-art* codebase for autoregressive image generation!
Applications self-hosting and DevOps platform for running open source, web-based linux Panel of lite PaaS
Open source AI terminal for cloud and infrastructure management, enabling you to deploy, troubleshoot, and automate services using natural language and intelligent agents.

53AI Hub is an open-source AI portal, which enables you to quickly build a operational-level AI portal to launch and operate AI agents, prompts, and AI tools. It supports seamless integration with development platforms like Coze, Dify, FastGPT, RAGFlow.
Replace coding puzzles with real-work simulations.
AI i18n, Two lines of js realize automatic html translation. No need to change the page, no language configuration file, no API key, SEO friendly!
惺惺 —— 属于你的社交地盘！惺惺是一个100%开源社交平台，每个人都可以搭建自己的服务器，掌握数据的所有权。此APP非盈利项目！
Foundations of Medical Large Language Model Learning
Modular SenseNova skills for building AI-powered office assistants and productivity workflows
AppPlatform 是一个前沿的大模型应用工程，旨在通过集成的声明式编程和低代码配置工具，简化和优化大模型的训练与推理应用的开发过程。本工程为软件工程师和产品经理提供一个强大的、可扩展的环境，以支持从概念到部署的全流程 AI 应用开发。
Bayesian optimisation & Reinforcement Learning library developed by Huawei Noah's Ark Lab
Auto-Manage Your Personal Task Context with AI.
Agent-ready RPA suite with out-of-the-box automation tools. Built for individuals and enterprises.
airda(Air Data Agent)是面向数据分析的多智能体，能够理解数据开发和数据分析需求、理解数据、生成面向数据查询、数据可视化、机器学习等任务的SQL和Python代码

Multi agent system for AI-driven software development. Combine LLM with DevOps tools to convert natural language requirements into working software. Supports any development language and extends the existing code.
Distributed GPU-Accelerated Framework for Evolutionary Computation. Comprehensive Library of Evolutionary Algorithms & Benchmark Problems.
Cyber Security ALL-IN-ONE Platform
Tutorials, Guides and Agent Skills Directories
[EMNLP-2024] Build multimodal language agents for fast prototype and production
Your Automatic Prompt Engineering Assistant for GenAI Applications

开源的端到端产品级通用智能体
One portable memory layer for every AI agent: local-first, Markdown-native, user-owned, and self-evolving across apps, tools, and workflows.

Mirix is a multi-agent personal assistant designed to track on-screen activities and answer user questions intelligently. By capturing real-time visual data and consolidating it into structured memories, Mirix transforms raw inputs into a rich knowledge base that adapts to your digital experiences.
Official repository for textual frequency law

cubestudio开源云原生一站式机器学习/深度学习/大模型AI平台/MaaS/mlops/人工智能平台/训推平台，算法全链路流程，多租户，算力租赁平台，token中转，拖拉拽任务流pipeline编排，多机多卡分布式训练，超参搜索，推理服务，VGPU虚拟化，云边端协同，边缘计算，自动化标注平台，deepseek等大模型sft微调/奖励模型/强化学习训练，vllm/ollama/mindie大模型多机推理，私有知识库llmops智能体，AI模型市场，支持国产异构算力调度,昇腾/寒武纪/海光/摩尔/沐曦等，支持ib/roce/RDMA，信创支持
A blueprint for building production-ready RAG systems that minimize hallucination, featuring switchable 3-step (Speed) and 4-step (Precision) pipelines.

Cocos simplifies game creation and distribution with Cocos Creator, a free, open-source, cross-platform game engine. Empowering millions of developers to create high-performance, engaging 2D/3D games and instant web entertainment.
[ECCV 2024] Champ: Controllable and Consistent Human Image Animation with 3D Parametric Guidance
AI-powered tool for efficient abstract and PDF screening in systematic reviews.

AI Group is a powerful mobile intelligent assistant application that integrates multiple large language models (LLMs) and AI services, providing you with a convenient intelligent interaction experience.
OpenCode Cover.
Predicting high-fitness mutations based on protein inverse folding models
Unified real-time search engine skill for AI agents.

[TKDE2025] Next-Generation Database Interfaces: A Survey of LLM-based Text-to-SQL | A curated list of resources (surveys, papers, benchmarks, and opensource projects) on large language model-based text-to-SQL.

本项目是一个基于 ​​Golang Gin 框架​​ 开发的 ​​B2C 电商平台​​，采用 ​​MVC（Model-View-Controller）架构​​ 进行模块化设计，能够扩展为实现前后端分离，支持后台商品管理、用户系统、订单交易、支付集成、数据分析等功能,系统地展示了现代Web应用的全貌。该项目描绘了一个功能完整、技术选型现代的​​全栈电商项目​​。它从前端交互到后端管理，从业务逻辑到技术架构，从开发到运维，都做了全面的考量。使用Go语言作为后端，预示着项目对高并发性能有较高的要求。同时支持RESTful，也体现了技术上的前瞻性和灵活性。
JittorGeometric is a Jittor-based graph machine learning library.

Data-centric LLM training with dynamic sample selection, domain mixture optimization, and example reweighting inside the LLaMA-Factory training loop.

A multi-modal vector database that supports upserts and vector queries using unified SQL (MySQL-Compatible) on structured and unstructured data, while meeting the requirements of high concurrency and ultra-low latency.
Uncommon Objects in 3D dataset
Open-source agent platform for Global × China enterprises — wire every system through one agent core. Self-hosted, any LLM.
Paper accepted by CIKM 2024. Codes of GongBU, a LLM fine-tuning platform for domain-specific adaptation.
